rule_text: AP EPC tender acceptance must follow the procedure specifically prescribed by Government for EPC tenders (not the generic stores tender procedure of Articles 127-128).
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, Note 1 under Article 193
verification_method: Check EPC tender acceptance follows Government-prescribed EPC procedure; reject application of generic Article-127 procedure to EPC

rule_text: AP EPC additional-items rules: (1) additional items CONTINGENT to main work AND WITHIN scope of contract — contractor must execute at NO EXTRA COST (cost deemed included in contract price); (2) additional items contingent to main work BUT OUTSIDE scope — entrustment requires PRIOR Government approval and price decided by Government; (3) additional items NOT CONTINGENT and OUTSIDE scope — referred to Government for final decision on entrustment and price.
source_clause: AP Financial Code Vol-I, addendum to Article 195 — EPC additional-items
verification_method: EPC additional-items: contingent-within-scope → no extra cost; contingent-outside-scope → Govt approval before entrustment; non-contingent-outside → Govt referral
